description_long: This is a medium-sized loaf of bread with a golden-brown crust and a slightly elongated, oval shape. The surface features three diagonal score marks, which are lighter in color and add a rustic, artisanal appearance. The crust appears firm but not overly thick, with a matte finish and subtle flour dusting in some areas. The ends of the loaf are rounded, and the overall form is slightly asymmetrical, suggesting it was hand-shaped. The bread's color transitions from a pale beige at the base to a deeper golden hue on the upper crust. No branding, packaging, or labeling is visible, and the loaf appears whole and unsliced.
description: A golden-brown, oval loaf of bread with three diagonal score marks and a rustic, matte crust. The loaf is unsliced and has a hand-shaped, artisanal appearance.
description_view_0: The loaf is seen from the side, highlighting its elongated shape and the three diagonal score marks on the upper crust.
description_view_1: This view shows one rounded end of the loaf, with the score marks curving toward the viewer and the crust's texture more visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view emphasizes the loaf's length and the gentle color gradient from the base to the top crust.
description_view_3: The other end of the loaf is visible, showing the rounded tip and the depth of the score marks in the crust.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features three diagonal score marks that are lighter in color, with a rustic, hand-scored appearance. The surface is matte with subtle flour dusting and a slightly uneven, artisanal texture.
